headline: Robinhood Ventures Fund I Links HOOD To Venture And Public Funds
summary: Robinhood Ventures Fund I has begun investing in public markets, with trading in its vehicle starting under the symbol RVI. The fund recently closed investments in private companies Stripe and ElevenLabs, adding a venture-style element to Robinhood Markets' offerings. This move expands Robinhood's business beyond its traditional brokerage and banking services on NasdaqGS:HOOD. Robinhood Markets, listed on NasdaqGS:HOOD, has built its core business around commission free trading, cash...

headline: Robinhood announces investments in Stripe, ElevenLabs
summary: Robinhood (HOOD) Ventures Fund I closed investments in Stripe and ElevenLabs. Robinhood Ventures Fund I (RVI), which is the first fund from Robinhood Ventures, began trading on the New York Stock Exchange on March 6, 2026 under the symbol RVI. As previously disclosed, on March 9, 2026 RVI purchased an aggregate of $14,577,645 of Class B Common Stock of Stripe Global Holdings Inc. in secondary transactions. Stripe is a programmable financial services company founded in 2010 with dual headquarters

headline: Why Robinhood Stock Fell 40% In Six Months?
summary: Between September 2025 and March 2026, Robinhood Markets (HOOD) saw a surprising 37% stock drop despite a 25% revenue jump, as crypto-driven revenue weakness and shrinking margins disappointed investors. This pullback signals some worries over growth quality amid potentially cooling platform activity.

This pullback signals some worries over growth quality amid potentially cooling platform activity.
